params.prompt:
Create an ultra-realistic old heritage school classroom interior in the exact same moody aesthetic as the reference image. Keep the same overall composition, same camera placement, and same framing: a wide centered shot from the back half of the classroom looking toward the front teacher area, with strong symmetry and deep room perspective. The camera should be placed at seated eye level / slightly above desk height, facing straight toward the blackboard and teacher desk.

CLASSROOM ARCHITECTURE:
A tall narrow classroom with a very high vaulted ceiling, exposed dark wooden roof trusses, large interior arches, and old colonial / missionary school architecture. The ceiling should have a few hanging pendant lights and ceiling fans, but the practical lights should not dominate. The room should feel old, quiet, slightly dramatic, and realistic.

LAYOUT:
On the RIGHT side of the classroom, place a row of tall arched wooden windows exactly in the spirit of the reference, extending along the wall. Some window panels can be slightly open. Cool blue ambient light should enter from these windows. Outside the windows, dense tropical greenery / palm leaves should be visible, just like an old school building surrounded by lush plants.

On the LEFT side of the classroom, make it a complete solid wall — no windows at all. This wall should have subtle school elements such as framed portraits, notice boards, educational charts, old framed certificates, or wall-mounted school display material. On this LEFT wall, place only ONE entrance door, and that door must be at the starting/front side of the wall from the camera angle — meaning near the teacher’s side/front of the classroom, on the left side of the blackboard wall zone. No other doors on the left wall.

FRONT TEACHER AREA:
At the front center, place a large wall-mounted blackboard. The blackboard must be fixed on the wall, not on a stand. In front of it, place a simple wooden teacher podium / teacher desk centered. Around the front wall, include old cupboards, a small bookshelf, maps, a few framed portraits, and academic wall charts in a restrained and believable way.

FURNITURE:
Fill the room with rows of old wooden student desks and benches, arranged neatly in perspective toward the front. The furniture should be dark polished wood, slightly aged, realistic, and grounded in an old-school aesthetic.

LIGHTING — VERY IMPORTANT:
Match the exact lighting mood of the reference image. The room should be dim and atmospheric, lit mainly by cool blue natural ambient light coming through the right-side windows. The lighting should feel like early dawn / blue-hour morning or rainy low-light ambience. The room must stay dark overall, with soft cool illumination wrapping through the windows and faintly shaping the desks, walls, and teacher area. Do not make it bright. Do not make it sunny. Do not make it warm golden hour. The mood should stay cool, shadowy, moody, cinematic, and calm, with subtle visibility across the room. Keep the light realistic and soft but the image itself must remain crisp and detailed.

STYLE:
Ultra-realistic, 4K, sharp details, realistic wood texture, realistic wall texture, realistic shadows, cinematic old-school atmosphere, grounded, natural, no softness, no blur, no painterly look.

NEGATIVE PROMPT:
windows on left wall, extra doors, more than one entrance door, bright daylight, warm sunlight, golden hour, overexposed room, modern classroom, plastic furniture, whiteboard, blackboard on stand, symmetrical windows on both sides, empty plain left wall with no school material, low detail, blur, soft image, fantasy look, CGI look, distorted perspective, wrong camera angle, off-center composition
